stemHtml: Cleared to hold at VENSA FL080. Weather reports show embedded CB and hail from FL070 up. AWR is unserviceable. What should the crew do?

options.a: Request a new level at VENSA to avoid the weather.
options.b: Advise ATC immediately that you cannot comply with the clearance.
options.c: Proceed to VENSA and hold at FL080 as cleared.
options.d: Divert to an alternate to avoid the weather.
